spec_match.rationale: The educational text is highly accurate and explains the double opt-in mechanism perfectly.

interactive.rationale: Completely static educational walkthrough with no interactive elements, live readouts, or capability checks.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Matches the conceptual walkthrough framing listed in the feature index.

edge_cases.rationale: Excellent text explanation of the security model and double-opt-in constraints.

design_system.rationale: Uses standard showcase styles and clean side-by-side grid layout.

openQuestions.title: Make the page interactive with a capability probe
openQuestions.detail: Add a live capability detection block that checks for allowResponsiveSizing attribute support in the browser (e.g., 'allowResponsiveSizing' in HTMLIFrameElement.prototype) and displays a warning if the browser does not support it natively.
